overall.description: A third-person perspective walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, towering digital billboards, and sparse pedestrian traffic. The footage from Cyberpunk 2077 shows the character walking along wet sidewalks beneath overhead walkways and past commercial buildings with glowing advertisements.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath a concrete overhang, following a pedestrian in a yellow jacket

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large concrete stairs and platform structure with blue neon accent lighting
tall building facade covered with red and white digital advertisements for DYNALAR
elevated pedestrian bridge with metal truss structure spanning the street
futuristic street lamp with horizontal light bar

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a futuristic city sidewalk at night, bordered by a massive concrete stair structure on the left and towering digital billboards on the right. The character walks forward beneath building overhangs, following a pedestrian in a yellow jacket, with sparse vehicle traffic visible on the multi-lane road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with bus shelter and corporate signage

events.description: passing the bus shelter structure and emerging from under the building overhang into more open street

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward along the sidewalk, passing a bus shelter and approaching a pedestrian in red pants

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and red pants walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: futuristic glass and metal bus shelter with illuminated advertising panels
large commercial building with prominent green 'MACROWARE' signage and vertical red lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a futuristic bus shelter and emerges from under the building overhang into a more open section of the commercial street. The MACROWARE building with its distinctive green signage dominates the right side, while the DYNALAR billboards recede into the distance. The sidewalk remains wet, reflecting the neon lights from the surrounding advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with color-changing light walls and large advertising displays

events.description: passing the large vertical billboard and entering the area with color-changing light walls

agents.ego_description: walking toward a large orange wall structure in the distance, passing colorful illuminated barriers

entered.detail: tall illuminated advertisement displaying 'FOCUS ON WINNING THIS FALL' with a figure in white
series of translucent barriers emitting shifting purple, blue, and pink neon light
large distinctive orange wall structure with circular green feature visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the character approaching and passing a massive vertical billboard before entering a more open plaza area. Color-changing light walls in vibrant purple and blue line the right side of the path, while a distinctive orange wall structure looms ahead. The MACROWARE building and overhead walkway recede into the background as the character continues toward the orange feature wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a neon-lit cyberpunk sidewalk that transitions from a sheltered urban corridor into a wide, open commercial thoroughfare. It begins beneath heavy building overhangs, moving past a massive concrete stair structure and towering digital billboards while following a pedestrian in a yellow jacket. As the camera advances, it passes a futuristic bus shelter and emerges from the shadows of the architecture into a more expansive section of the street. The scene then shifts its focus toward the dominant green signage of the MACROWARE building on the right, while the DYNALAR billboards recede into the distance. Finally, the view opens up to reveal a wet sidewalk that vividly reflects the surrounding neon advertisements under the night sky.

The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a narrow commercial corridor into a wide, brightly lit urban plaza. It begins as the character passes a massive vertical billboard, leaving the MACROWARE building and an overhead walkway to recede into the background. As the path opens up, the camera glides past vibrant purple and blue color-changing light walls that line the right side of the walkway. The scene then shifts toward a looming orange feature wall that dominates the forward view. Finally, the movement culminates as the character enters the expansive plaza area, moving directly toward the glowing orange structure.
